---
html:
    margin-top: 100px
image: perfil.png
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/public-profile/settings?trk=d_flagship3_profile_self_view_public_profile
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/GabrielPalucci
comments: false
---

```{=html}

<style>
    body {
        text-align: justify;
    }

    p {
        margin-top: 120px;
    }
</style>

<body>
    <p> Hello, I`am doctoral studente. My studies are related soil classification, pedogenesis and relation soil-landscape. In the last year I have been studing about Anthrosol in Pantanal, theme of my dissertation. The project of this blog is share some ideas about soil science and scientific divulgation </p>
</body>

<a href = "https://gabrielpalucci.github.io/Blog/blog.html"style = "color: #d2a88f; font-size: 20px; ; font-family: 'Garamond', sans-serif; color: #9e4826"> <b> You can learn about me ->  </b> </a>
```
